sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try one more CW rotation and check if level completes
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 32, 'col': 59}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)

# Check current ring state
def get_ring_colors(frame):
    seg = frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    ring_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['pixels'] == 16]
    pos_color = {}
    for n in ring_nodes:
        cr = sum(r for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(c for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        pos_color[(cr, cc)] = n['color']
    ring_order = [
        (20.5, 13.5), (20.5, 19.5), (20.5, 25.5), (20.5, 31.5), (20.5, 37.5), (20.5, 43.5), (20.5, 49.5),
        (26.5, 49.5), (32.5, 49.5), (38.5, 49.5),
        (44.5, 49.5), (44.5, 43.5), (44.5, 37.5), (44.5, 31.5), (44.5, 25.5), (44.5, 19.5), (44.5, 13.5),
        (38.5, 13.5), (32.5, 13.5), (26.5, 13.5)
    ]
    return [pos_color[pos] for pos in ring_order]

current = get_ring_colors(current_frame)
print("Current ring after action:", current)
print("Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
print("Done:", last_action_result.get('done', False))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Try one more CW rotation and check if level completes
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 32, 'col': 59}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)

# Check current ring state
def get_ring_colors(frame):
    seg = frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    ring_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['pixels'] == 16]
    pos_color = {}
    for n in ring_nodes:
        cr = sum(r for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(c for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        pos_color[(cr, cc)] = n['color']
    ring_order = [
        (20.5, 13.5), (20.5, 19.5), (20.5, 25.5), (20.5, 31.5), (20.5, 37.5), (20.5, 43.5), (20.5, 49.5),
        (26.5, 49.5), (32.5, 49.5), (38.5, 49.5),
        (44.5, 49.5), (44.5, 43.5), (44.5, 37.5), (44.5, 31.5), (44.5, 25.5), (44.5, 19.5), (44.5, 13.5),
        (38.5, 13.5), (32.5, 13.5), (26.5, 13.5)
    ]
    return [pos_color[pos] for pos in ring_order]

current = get_ring_colors(current_frame)
print("Current ring after action:", current)
print("Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
print("Done:", last_action_result.get('done', False))
